main.description: Grant access permissions to a user for a shared repository. Requires auth and repository ownership or admin privileges.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repository to grant access to.

userDid.description: The DID of the user to grant access to.

permissions.description: The permissions to grant to the user.

success.description: Whether the access was successfully granted.

grantedAt.description: Timestamp when the access was granted.

collaborator.description: Information about the newly added collaborator.

errors.name: RepositoryNotFound
errors.description: The specified repository could not be found.

errors.name: UserNotFound
errors.description: The specified user could not be found.

errors.name: InsufficientPermissions
errors.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to grant access to this repository.

errors.name: InvalidPermissions
errors.description: The specified permissions are invalid or malformed.

permissions.description: Repository access permissions aligned with OAuth's granular action model

create.description: Permission to create new records in the repository.

update.description: Permission to update existing records in the repository.

delete.description: Permission to delete records from the repository.

owner.description: Owner permissions (full control including ownership transfer).

permissions.description: The permissions granted to this collaborator.

grantedBy.description: The DID of the user who granted these permissions.

grantedAt.description: Timestamp when the permissions were granted.

revokedAt.description: Timestamp when the permissions were revoked (if applicable).
